data.content:
All 7 tests pass. Here's what was created:

**`tests/ServiceRegistryTests.cs`** — 7 MSTest tests covering:

| Test | Assertion used |
|------|---------------|
| Register & Resolve | `Assert.AreSame` (reference equality) |
| Same instance on multiple resolves | `Assert.AreSame` |
| Null for unregistered service | `Assert.IsNull` |
| Clear removes all | `Assert.IsNull` + `Assert.AreEqual(0, …)` |
| Remove specific registration | `Assert.IsNull` / `Assert.IsNotNull` |
| Register null throws | `Assert.ThrowsException<ArgumentNullException>` |
| ResolveRequired throws when missing | `Assert.ThrowsException<InvalidOperationException>` |

I also enabled `ImplicitUsings` and `Nullable` in both `.csproj` files so the projects compile cleanly.
